title: MyGift 6 Piece Clear Glass Apothecary Jar Set with Copper Lid - Decorative Kitchen and Bath Storage Canisters, Wedding Centerpiece Jars, Candy Buffet with Lids
description:
About this item
Clear glass decorative jars perfect for storing kitchen and bathroom supplies; Metallic copper-tone lids complement a variety of decors
Can be used to store toiletries such as swabs and cotton balls, or used to store candy, pasta and rice in your kitchen
Small size perfect for display on desks, shelves, tables, and countertops
Approximate Dimensions (each jar, in inches): Large - 12.25 H x 6.25 Diameter; Medium - 9.0 H x 5.0 Diameter; Small - 6.75 H x 4.5 Diameter (in inches)
reviews_5s:
Play Video
Nice set, good size and perfect on my counter. I love itThis added to the home decor.After reading some of the reviews I was cautiously optimistic about these jars.

They were nicely packaged and the glass was thicker than I expected.

I had been looking at some similar to crate and barrel but thought I would try these due to the price difference. For the price these fit the bill just fine.

I am glad I took a chance.perfect for my coffee stationLove these, thick glass.These are the perfect addition for a French country/copper style kitchen. They have clean lines, no smudges/chips/dents and feel nice and sturdy. Altogether very pleased. The big one is quite large, so take the measurements into consideration.There were a couple of slight imperfections in the glass but nothing that bothers me too much. These canisters are almost identical to the ones sold at Crate & Barrel but MUCH cheaper. I wish I had discovered these before buying the more expensive ones years ago...These are stunningly clear glass and the copper tops are gorgeous! I keep coffee pods in them but they would showcase anything. I ordered my first set of three then I ordered a second set of three.Wrapped well for transport. I used these jars as decoration in my laundry.I was so worried they would be delivered broken but I'm happy to report they arrived beautiful ! Cleaned them up and they shine so beautifully and definitely make a statement sitting on my counter !
reviews_1s: I was only able to use 2 of the canisters because the lid for the medium sized one is misshapen and won't go on it. They definitely aren't for food storage as there is no seal on the lids.Three jars. One large, one medium, and one small. The medium jar has a giant chip in the bottom and was clearly packaged that way as the missing shard was not in the tight packing Styrofoam or box. The smallest one and its lid are so far from fitting it's a joke. Choose another. You'll be happier.there is no rubber around the lid to avoid the glass making contact when you put lid on and will eventually chip the glass. Anyone know where I can adhesive rubber strips to put around the rim of the lid?Play VideoThe smallest container's lid does not fit. It is way too small. Will return this set as it also looks pretty cheap.
